And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Nicola is a natural winemaker living in a remote village near Crotone, where his atavistic pursuit of wine is under active siege from climate related wildfires and the prolonged dry seasons. For Nicola, and other winemakers like him, this environmental change has existential consequences it threatens his livelihood. “Wildfire” patiently observes Nicola in this affective state of anxiety—as the wildfire grows within him—as he's forced to alter the course of his harvest in real time. Directed by Andree Ljutica.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: Fight or Flight chronicles the journey of the first female pilot employed by Colorado Parks and Wildlife. Drawn to flying as a means to flee her early trauma, she pursues a career in professional aviation and discovers she must first assemble the tools required to face her past and heal. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"

programme.title: Bloody Nose, Empty Pockets
programme.desc: On the eve of the 2016 U.S. presidential election, and on its final night before closing, a Las Vegas dive bar becomes a stage where its employees and barflies commiserate one last time. Directed by filmmaking brothers Bill and Turner Ross.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: When two peregrine falcons at a local high rise become grounded after a mysterious illness, veterinarian Chris Brown must find the cure to help these birds retake flight. And can the SASH team save a six-year-old retriever named Jasmine from a potentially fatal twisted stomach?

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: When a baby kangaroo is brought into the clinic, veterinarian Chris Brown does everything he can to try to save this fragile infant. But can the little joey make it without his mom? Plus, a helping hand for a puppy with a life-threatening problem. And Chris confronts his archenemy…a chihuahua with a mean streak.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: When a man's dog bites his girlfriend's little terrier, veterinarian Chris Brown finds himself in the middle of a domestic drama. And the veterinarians at SASH attempt their first ever hip replacement on a one-year-old retriever, Brooklyn, who's been crippled by arthritis.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: When you take care of animals for a living, sometimes work follows you home. For Chris Brown, when an animal's in trouble he's willing to go the extra mile. Chris has opened his house up to a number of sick animals including an abandoned 12-year-old cat, an infant penguin with a mysterious illness, and a baby joey separated from his mother.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: Veterinarian Chris Brown is called to help a greyhound with a balance problem. Chris is confronted with the smallest patient he's ever handled, a pet mouse with a massive tumor. The life of a little kitten is threatened by a large rubber band.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.sub-title: We're not Lion, there's an Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The park's youngest pride of lions is growing up, and one of the female cubs is due in for an important appointment with The Wildlife Docs. Plus, the team at Busch Gardens must move a 13,000 ppound Asian bull elephant to a new habitat. The elephant team has been working with Spike for months, training him to voluntarily enter a transportation crate that will be hoisted by a construction crane. Will Spike stay calm in the air?

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: The team has been hand raising two adorable cheetah cubs since they were several weeks old. Now, The Wildlife Docs must make sure they are healthy enough to move into their new home at the park. Then, the docs pay an African antelope a visit after the team discovers that she has been having trouble eating.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.sub-title: Best of: What the Heck Are They
programme.desc: Busch Gardens is home to more than 12,000 animals so it's not surprising there are a few creatures that you might not be too familiar with. Today, we're going to introduce you to four very unique animals: the one-of-a-kind aardvark, the vocal gibbon, a hard-shelled baby armadillo, and an adorable lesser bush baby.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: When young koala Jack is spotted with unusual growths all over his face, Tim Faulkner calls in Dr. Chris for reinforcements. Then, the SASH team treats a box full of newborn orphaned kittens. And, Chris heads to a local zoo to give some feisty meerkats their annual examination.

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: After a powerful snake named Hank the Tank bites his own tail and poisons himself, Chris rushes to the local reptile park to help. Then, beloved Labrador Scooby has trouble walking and his family is worried about his future. Can the SASH team get him back on his feet?

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Chris gives seven puppies a thorough check up before their training begins. Then Apple the pup can't stop shaking. Will Emergency Vet Dr. Lisa Chimes figure out the cause and get this sweet girl into a forever home? And, Tim calls Chris for a big favor on a small lizard with a broken leg.

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.
